description_long: This bungalow features a low, horizontal profile with a prominent gabled roof covered in reddish-brown shingles. The front facade includes a small covered porch supported by columns, and a mix of rectangular and square windows, some grouped together for visual interest. The exterior walls are finished in a light color, likely stucco or painted siding, with wooden trim accentuating the roofline and porch. A single tree and a paved driveway or walkway are present adjacent to the structure, suggesting a suburban or residential neighborhood setting. The rear of the bungalow is enclosed by a low fence, and the overall footprint is compact and rectangular. The roof includes dormer windows, adding architectural detail and natural light to the attic or upper space.
description: A single-story bungalow with a gabled roof, front porch, and a mix of grouped and individual windows, finished in light-colored walls with wooden accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, main entrance, and symmetrical window arrangement with a tree to the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the gabled roof, the tree, and the enclosed rear yard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back windows, low fence, and the overall rectangular footprint of the bungalow.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the plain wall, tree, and the extension of the roof over the side.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side windows
